race.comment: Tough way to end the day. MAL COUPE (12) spaced his rivals by a big margin first-up in weaker grade over the 1000m in Midway class. Should have little trouble running the 1200m and will get conditions to suit. Sure to be thereabouts. ROSELYN'S STAR (6) proven at this level and gets his chance with Grima's 3kg claim. No match for Sixties with the 58kg when a game second over 1200m at Rosehill in this grade. Fitted with a 795m trial placing and doesn't have to improve much to win this. BEV'S NINE (11) is undefeated in four starts and can raise the bar again out to the 1200m for the first time. Ploughed through the heavy (8) going on his return when scoring over 1100m at Rosehill. Since fitted with a 902m trial placing and not without genuine top-three prospects. MONTE KATE (10) has gone to a new level this time in with the two wins in succession shouldering the big weights. Can surprise with the sharp weight drop at the big each way price. GATSBY'S (8) stays in the calculations.
